t_ch: 她的魂息乘着西风，提前飞向那个没有悲伤的世界了。
t_en: Her spirit is now riding the west wind, flying ahead to a world free of sorrow.

t_ch: 如果那样的世界真的存在……
t_en: If a world like that truly exists...

t_ch: 树庭的大家…会不会已经抵达了？
t_en: Does that mean everyone from the Grove is there too?

t_ch: 它一定存在，风堇。记得吗？指引黄金裔的神谕，是刻法勒缄默前留下的声音。
t_en: It exists, Hyacine. Do you not remember? The prophecy that guides the Chrysos Heirs is the voice of Kephale before it fell silent.

t_ch: 它深爱着自己的造物，不会忍心用谎言带领我们走上歧途。
t_en: It loves all of its creations dearly, and would never bear to lead us astray with lies.

t_ch: 那个悬锋老将呢，他的情况如何？
t_en: What about the Kremnoan veteran? How is he doing?

t_ch: 昏光庭院尽力了，但也只能做到…勉强延续他的生命。
t_en: The Twilight Courtyard has done all we can. Even so, we've only managed to keep him from breathing his last.

t_ch: 我用了天空祭司的手段，才让他能再度行走。但倘若有一日，光明从奥赫玛彻底消失…但愿那种事不会发生吧。
t_en: I had to use the Sky Priests' techniques to help him walk again, but if light ever disappears from Okhema for good... No, let's hope that never happens.

t_ch: 这已经是奇迹了。我们找到克拉特鲁斯的时候，他几乎与死者无异。
t_en: This is already nothing short of miraculous. When we found Krateros, he was no better than a corpse.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#黄昏}离愁时{RUBY_E#}将近，金丝却趋于舒弛，英雄们也带着战利品归来了。
t_en: The {RUBY_B#Dusk}Parting Hour{RUBY_E#} is upon us, yet the golden thread runs slack. The heroes have returned with their spoils.

t_ch: …各位先借此机会，休息整备吧。
t_en: ...Everyone, please take this opportunity to rest and prepare for what awaits us.

t_ch: 想来还有些不可思议，我们刚刚才归还了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种…不夸张地说，{NICKNAME}，你们的到来融化了历史的冰川。
t_en: It's incredible to think that we returned {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame not so long ago... It wouldn't be an exaggeration to say that {NICKNAME} and your friend's arrival has melted the glaciers of history.

t_ch: 这就是「开拓」的意义。
t_en: This is what Trailblazing is.

t_ch: 无名客走到哪，麻烦就跟到哪。
t_en: Where a Nameless goes, trouble follows.

t_ch: 我们也融化过真正的冰川…
t_en: We've melted a real glacier before...

t_ch: 不如说，这才是历史真实的模样：沉眠千年，只待觉醒的一瞬。可惜，现在不是研讨史观的时候。
t_en: You could say this is the true face of history. It slumbered for a thousand years, only to awaken for this one moment. Alas, now is not the time for a study of history.

t_ch: 那刻夏不在，是你授意的吗，白厄？
t_en: I do not see Anaxa around. Was this under your instructions, Phainon?

t_ch: …是。相比旁观你们两个吵得不可开交，我认为这样更有效率。
t_en: ...Yes. It just seems much more efficient than letting you two go at it endlessly.

t_ch: 这很鲁莽，他身上毕竟还携带着一颗火种。
t_en: A rash decision. After all, he still bears a Coreflame with him.

t_ch: 但关于提升效率的判断…恐怕你是对的。他的问题先放到一边，当务之急是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，此事尤为棘手。
t_en: I do concur with your assessment of efficiency, though. Now, let us table the issue concerning him for the moment. The more urgent matter is the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 涉及火种归还的次序，黄金裔原本制定了战略。对于那些不会主动为害人间的泰坦——譬如{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}——我们本计划最后接过它们的神职。
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs had initially crafted a plan regarding the order to return the Coreflames. For Titans like Oronyx and {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, who harbor no intentions of harming humanity, our strategy entailed assuming their divinity only at the very end.

t_ch: 但这场异变打乱了一切。
t_en: But this unforeseen turn of events has thrown everything into disarray.

t_ch: 如果不把火种归还涡心，让泰坦的神位就这么空着…不知会有怎样的劫难发生！
t_en: If we don't return the Coreflames to the Vortex of Genesis and we leave the Titans' divine positions vacant... we can't even begin to imagine the disaster that would follow!

t_ch: 可如今最大的问题…<color=#dbc291ff>是我们还没找到能背负</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>岁月之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>神职的黄金裔</color>。
t_en: But the most pressing issue at hand... <color=#dbc291ff>is that we haven't found the Chrysos Heir capable of bearing</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Time Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s divinity</color>.

t_ch: 白厄、遐蝶、万敌、风堇…我和吾师在世间寻觅千年，才终于找到了他们。
t_en: Phainon, Castorice, Mydei, and Hyacine... Tribbie and I devoted a millennium scouring the world, only to find these few people.

t_ch: 万中选一的适格者，黄金裔中的魁首，若不能确信这些人拥有背负神权的潜质，我和吾师断然不会发出邀请。
t_en: Only a chosen few possess the capacity to assume divinity, the elite among the Chrysos Heirs. We would never hastily extend our invitation without first verifying their potential to bear such power.

t_ch: 而逼迫凡众履行这一职责，无异于将其送上绞架。
t_en: Yet we cannot compel anyone into divinity, as it would be no different from sentencing them to the gallows.

t_ch: 还真是头疼啊……
t_en: Truly a dilemma...
Yeah...
Well...

t_ch: 要不要让{NICKNAME}试试？
t_en: How about letting {NICKNAME} give it a try?

t_ch: 就等你这句话呢，伙伴。
t_en: I've been waiting for someone to say that, friend.

t_ch: 送我上绞架就没事了？
t_en: So, you're okay with sentencing me to the gallows?

t_ch: 宠物发言，主人概不负责。
t_en: The owner isn't liable for their pet's words.

t_ch: 我是认真的哦！你对翁法罗斯具有特别的意义，这点大家都心知肚明。而{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: I'm serious! You're special to Amphoreus, and we all know that. Now, about {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 把我投射到这世上、让我拥有了这幅身体的，不就是那个{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦，欧洛尼斯}比孩子都任性的泰坦宝宝{RUBY_E#}嘛！
t_en: Isn't the one who projected me into this world and granted me this body... that {RUBY_B#Time Titan, Oronyx}baby Titan even more capricious than a child{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 你们回来了。毫发无伤，还带回了胜利的消息——可喜可贺。
t_en: You've returned unscathed and brought tidings of triumph. Truly a moment worthy of celebration.

t_ch: 奥赫玛的风中有阳光的味道……
t_en: We smell sunlight in the wind of Okhema...

t_ch: 你以前最喜欢这里了。对吧，缇安？
t_en: This was your favorite spot, wasn't it, Trianne?

t_ch: 缇安大人，为什么…会变成这样呢？
t_en: Lady Trianne... Why did it have to end up like this?

t_ch: 轻松些，蝶。人生总有离去，只不过*我们*的告别，来得不如常人那般暴烈。
t_en: Take it easy, Cas. Departure is a part of life. It's just that ours isn't as tumultuous as it is for ordinary folks.

t_ch: 在*我们*踏上旅途时，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}就已降下预言。就像它分裂自身，化作世间万千门径……
t_en: When we started our journey, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} had already provided their prophecy. Just like how that Titan divided themself to create the countless passages in the world...

t_ch: *我们*接过它的命运，走上相同的轨迹也是理所当然。
t_en: It's only natural for us to follow the same path since we inherited their destiny.

t_ch: 缇宝老师，如果不介意……
t_en: If you don't mind, Tribbie...

t_ch: 你还愿意为我们揭露那段历史么？有关「神谕」的过往。
t_en: Are you still willing to unveil that past for us? The past regarding the "prophecy."

t_ch: 小白想了解的是什么呢？
t_en: What do you seek to learn, Snowy?

t_ch: 迈德漠斯出发了，去背负属于他的命运。
t_en: Mydeimos has left the city to face his own fate.

t_ch: 这是每一位半神的使命。终有一日，我们都要卸下过往，踏上和他同样的道路。
t_en: That is the fate of every demigod. We will all eventually let go of our past to follow the same path as his.

t_ch: 所以，我想知道——身为翁法罗斯第一位半神，是怎样的勇气让你迈出了这条路上最初的一步。
t_en: So, what I want to know is — As Amphoreus' first demigod, what compelled you to take the first step on this journey?

t_ch: 又是什么支撑着你，在打碎自身，经历无数离别后，依旧能义无反顾地走到今天。
t_en: And what has sustained you to make it this far without looking back, despite the fracturing of your body and the numerous departures you have endured?

t_ch: …可以呀。
t_en: ...Alright.

t_ch: 吾师，没关系么？
t_en: Teacher, are you sure about this?

t_ch: 小敌都已经身体力行了…我们还有什么理由瞒着大家呢？走吧，各位——
t_en: De is already doing what he has to do... What reason do we have to keep it from them? Let's go, everyone...

t_ch: 去命运重渊，看看它过去的样子。
t_en: Let's go to the Abyss of Fate and see how it used to be.

t_ch: 算我一个。
t_en: Count me in.

t_ch: 谢谢你。太好啦。
t_en: That's great. Thank you.

t_ch: 迷迷，出来上工！
t_en: Mem, time to work!

t_ch: 那…拜托你们啦。
t_en: Then... we will leave it to you.

t_ch: 可以麻烦你吗，缇宁？
t_en: Trinnon, would you mind?

t_ch: 缇宝老师…你不来么？
t_en: Tribbie... Are you not coming with us?

t_ch: *我*想留在这里，再多陪陪缇安。
t_en: I want to stay here with Trianne for a bit longer.

t_ch: 明白了。那我们先走了，保重。
t_en: I see. We'll be off, then. Take care.

t_ch: 既然心意已决，就照你说的做吧……
t_en: Since you have made your decision, then let's proceed as you wish...

t_ch: 一会儿见，吾师。
t_en: See you later, teacher.

t_ch: 阿蝶，你不一起去么？
t_en: Cas, are you not going with them?

t_ch: 不了。我更想待在缇安大人身边。
t_en: No, I'd prefer to remain here to accompany Lady Trianne.

t_ch: 她…最怕孤单了。
t_en: She... hated being alone.

t_ch: …这是？
t_en: What's this...?

t_ch: 一件小礼物，本想当面交给她…可惜，命运跑得太快。
t_en: A little gift that I had hoped to deliver to her personally... though Fate had other plans.

t_ch: 原来那天，你看见*我们*争吵了吗？
t_en: Oh, so you saw us arguing that day?

t_ch: 是的。我觉得缇安大人肯定很喜欢，就把它买下来了。
t_en: Yes. I figured Lady Trianne would like it a lot, so I bought it.

t_ch: 这样呀。
t_en: I see.

t_ch: 阿蝶，其实，*我*当初一眼就认出了它，这确实是雅努萨波利斯的真品。
t_en: Cas, you know, I recognized it immediately that day. It truly is an authentic piece from Janusopolis.

t_ch: 那为什么……
t_en: Then why...?

t_ch: 只是，缇安失去的记忆比我多多了。比如她忘了……
t_en: It's just that Trianne had forgotten far more things than I. For example...

t_ch: 这个玻璃制品在*我们*家乡的传统中，寓意并不吉利。
t_en: She forgot that this glass object meant something unfortunate according to the traditions of our homeland.

t_ch: 啊…对不起，缇宝大人，那我……
t_en: Ah... I'm sorry, Lady Tribbie. Should I...

t_ch: 别道歉，阿蝶。那时，我只是不希望她被过去困住，毕竟*我们*离开家乡很久了。
t_en: No need to apologize, Cas. At that time, I simply didn't want her to be trapped by our past, especially considering how much time had passed since we left home.

t_ch: 但现在…它或许是给缇安的，最好的礼物了吧。
t_en: But now... it might just be the perfect gift for Trianne.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"</color>

t_ch: 即便你我早已对这荒诞的命运释怀，可他们终究涉世未深……
t_en: While you and I have long accepted this absurd fate, they remain fresh and inexperienced...

t_ch: 吾师，别让这道残酷的预言压垮他们的脊梁。
t_en: Teacher, don't let the weight of that cruel prophecy crush their spines.

t_ch: 可要他们带着无知倒在新世界的门关前，那反而更加残酷。
t_en: But it would be even more cruel if we allow them to ignorantly fall before the gates of the new world.

t_ch: 大家总有一天要知道真相，只是需要一个合适的机会……
t_en: They will eventually need to know the truth. We just need the right opportunity...

t_ch: 我想，现在是时候了。
t_en: This, to me, feels like the right opportunity.

t_ch: 我们到了，此处就是记忆汇聚最多的结点。
t_en: This is it, the node where the most memories converge.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，小白，你们准备好了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, Snowy, are you ready?

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 那就拜托两位了。
t_en: I'll leave it to you two, then.

t_ch: 来吧，伙伴！记忆正在涌现——
t_en: Come, my friends! Memories are surging forth...

t_ch: 往世的入口——为我们洞开！
t_en: The entrance to the past — Open for us!

t_ch: 我…迷迷还得准备一下。
t_en: I... Mem still needs some time.

t_ch: 什么…不许甩锅给我！
t_en: What...? Don't shift the blame on me!

t_ch: 既然这样，{NICKNAME}先处理私事吧。我们在这边等你。
t_en: In that case, please attend to your affairs first, {NICKNAME}. We'll be waiting for you here.

t_ch: 这就是过去的命运三相殿……
t_en: So, this is how the Temple of the Three Fates looked back in the day...

t_ch: 此时的雅努萨波利斯尚在{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的照拂下。不过，门城的命运已经由盛转衰，仅是表面光鲜。
t_en: At this point, Janusopolis still resides under {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} protection, yet it is already fated for decline, and only contains a beautiful facade.

t_ch: 因为翁法罗斯已步入纷争世？
t_en: Is it because Amphoreus has entered Era Bellica?

t_ch: 嗯。眼下纷争还远在翁法罗斯的另一边，但五年后的同一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，这座圣殿将成为又一场战火的源头。
t_en: Yes. Strife remains distant from this part of Amphoreus right now, but in five years' time, at the same {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, this temple will become the source of another war.

t_ch: 那，这时的你们在哪里呢？
t_en: Then... where are you at this time?

t_ch: 就在那边——
t_en: Right over there...

t_ch: 她的样子…为什么有些不同？
t_en: Why does she look somewhat different?

t_ch: 因为……
t_en: It's because...

t_ch: 自己过去的样子，*我们*也记不太清了。
t_en: We don't quite recall how we used to look.

t_ch: …抱歉。
t_en: ...My apologies.

t_ch: 不，应该是*我们*要请大家见谅。来吧，大家——
t_en: Please don't. We should be the ones apologizing. Come, everyone...

t_ch: 听听*我们*与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的最后一次长谈吧。
t_en: It's time to witness our last conversation with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 缇里西…庇俄丝……
t_en: Tri... bios...

t_ch: 你来啦，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: You're here, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 咦，能听懂泰坦说话了？
t_en: Wait, I can understand the Titan language now?

t_ch: 好先进的同声传译。
t_en: Fancy simultaneous interpretation!

t_ch: 因为这份记忆属于*我们*，知觉也与当年的缇里西庇俄丝相连。
t_en: This is our memory, so your senses are also aligned with the Tribios' of that moment.

t_ch: 你还在…为那虚假的预言…磨灭自己。
t_en: You still... consume yourself... for that false prophecy.

t_ch: 「虚假的预言」…你还是这么认为呀。
t_en: "False prophecy," huh? So you still think that way.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}…即便身陨，也绝无可能指引凡人弑杀它的同袍。
t_en: Even if {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has fallen... they would never guide humans to kill their own comrades.

t_ch: 停手吧，缇里西庇俄丝…若散播预言，只会引发灾难。那灾难…足以将你撕成千片。
t_en: Stop while you still can. Tribios... Spreading the prophecy will only kindle disaster. That disaster... will tear you into a thousand pieces.

t_ch: 可黑潮已经降临，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}也长眠不醒…如果为凡人指点迷津的门神都无法抵抗灾厄，我们又能奈灭亡的命运如何？
t_en: But the black tide has already arrived, and {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} remains in slumber. If even the god of passages, known for guiding mortals, cannot resist this catastrophe, then what can we do against the incoming destruction?

t_ch: 别去…染指火种。这样，至少你依旧是…命运的宠儿。
t_en: Do not... get involved with the Coreflames. If you do that... You can still remain chosen by fate.

t_ch: 命运的宠儿…又怎会被命运夺去至亲？
t_en: Those chosen by fate would never have their family taken from them.

t_ch: 我要如何遥望世界崩毁，却独善其身？
t_en: And how can I alone remain safe and secure, while watching the entire world crumble before my eyes?

t_ch: 这或许是我们最后一次交谈了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。我会尽我所能…从黑潮中保护你。
t_en: This might be our last conversation, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. I will do everything I can... to protect you from the black tide.

t_ch: 她刚才提到了「至亲」……
t_en: The "family" she just mentioned...

t_ch: 嗯，是*我们*的母亲。早在很久以前，她就从这里跌落谷底……
t_en: It's our mother. She fell from this spot into the valley a long time ago...

t_ch: 那是一场浩大的仪式，为的是求告{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}降下前路的指引……
t_en: It was during a grand ceremony held to seek {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' guidance...

t_ch: 但阴差阳错…反而是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}回应了人们。
t_en: But things took an unexpected turn... It was {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} who responded instead.

t_ch: 是…仪式出了差错么？
t_en: ...Did something go wrong with the ceremony?

t_ch: 是那场仪式有问题。但一码归一码，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的回应只是一场巧合——
t_en: Yes, but those two occurrences were in fact unrelated. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s response was simply a coincidence.

t_ch: 在那白霜环绕的阴谋之夜，雅努萨波利斯的圣女遇害的同时…负世的泰坦也在世界一隅崩落。
t_en: On that frosty night with treachery abound, as the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis met her demise... the Worldbearing Titan also fell in another corner of the world.

t_ch: 跟上她吧。这段故事…还得由她亲自讲述。
t_en: Let's keep up with her. This story... she should be the one to tell it.

t_ch: 这是…缇宁老师当年卜筮用的「雅努斯迷津」？
t_en: Is this... Janus' Maze that Trinnon used for divination in the past?

t_ch: 不仅如此，这还是一道门锁——封印着*我们*儿时的住处。
t_en: Not only that. It also serves as a lock — our childhood abode lies sealed within.

t_ch: 头一回见这么大的，还能充当门锁…不愧是迷津的发源地。我们要怎么破解它？
t_en: This is the largest puzzle I've ever laid eyes on, and it even acts as a door lock... Should've expected something like this in the homeland of puzzles, I suppose. So, how are we going to solve it?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>按照提前设计好的路径，让石球落入池中两次就好。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Just follow the designated path and let the stone ball fall into the pool twice.</color>

t_ch: 听起来挺简单的，也许万敌都能一遍过。
t_en: Seems pretty straightforward. Even Mydei might be able to complete it in a single try.

t_ch: 怎么背后说人坏话！
t_en: How could you talk smack about Mydei behind his back!

t_ch: 哪里的话，我这不是在夸他嘛。
t_en: That's not talking smack. It's clearly a compliment.

t_ch: 你说得对，但至少得两遍。
t_en: I agree it's straightforward, but Mydei might need at least two shots at it.

t_ch: 你还是不懂他：没准都用不着第一遍，他就会一拳把门揍开了。
t_en: You still don't know him well enough then. He might not even need a first try — he'd just punch the door open.

t_ch: 哎，那家伙…要是他还在，许多问题根本不必弯弯绕绕。
t_en: Mydei... If he were still here, we'd probably take a lot fewer detours to solve our issues.

t_ch: 嚯，这书架可真够壮观的，堪比树庭的友爱之馆了。
t_en: Look at that! This bookshelf is quite a sight, almost on par with the Library of Philia back at the Grove.

t_ch: 这些大多是对每次仪式流程和结果的记录。早些年还有参考价值，可越往后便越……
t_en: These are mostly accounts of the proceedings and results of each ceremony. In the early years, they were valuable resources for reference, but as time passed...

t_ch: 雅努斯的印记…这就是暗门了？
t_en: The mark of Janus... Is this the secret door?

t_ch: 没错，*我们*当年的住处…是一座隐蔽的地下室。
t_en: That's correct. The place we once called home... was a concealed basement.

t_ch: 你们当年…就在这种地方长大？
t_en: You grew up... in a place like this?

t_ch: *我们*出生时，「圣女」这一身份已经名存实亡。能聆听泰坦指引的人，势必要担当他人的喉舌。
t_en: By the time we were born, the role of the Holy Maiden had already diminished to a mere title. Those in tune with the Titan's guidance are bound to become messengers for others.

t_ch: 但为了体面，当权者还是稍微布置了一下。再加上有妈妈陪伴，*我们*的童年不算悲伤。
t_en: To maintain appearances, those in authority added some embellishments. And with Mother around, our childhood wasn't entirely without joy.

t_ch: 可即便如此…我还是难以想象。
t_en: Even so, I still find it hard to imagine.

t_ch: 不过二十来年光阴，很快的。
t_en: Twenty years can go by in no time.

t_ch: 缇宁老师，二十年对常人来说…已经足够漫长了。
t_en: Trinnon, for most people... twenty years is a long period of time.

t_ch: 也是。成为半神后，连时间观念都……
t_en: Right. Becoming a demigod sure changes how one lives through time...

t_ch: 没想到都过去这么久了。{NICKNAME}的力量真不可思议，这里简直和过去一模一样……
t_en: It's hard to believe that it's been so long. Your power is exceptional, {NICKNAME}. This place looks exactly as before...

t_ch: 这里有块黑板。上面画的是什么？
t_en: There is a blackboard here. What's that drawing on it?

t_ch: 不记得了。但应该是*我们*那十年间的发明创造吧。
t_en: That doesn't ring a bell. It should be something we invented during those ten years.

t_ch: 「那十年」是指？
t_en: Those ten years?

t_ch: 发明创造？你们独自做的吗？
t_en: Invented? On your own?

t_ch: 自听到{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的预言算起，到此时此刻即将出发，大约有十年左右。
t_en: It has been approximately ten years between {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s prophecy and this moment, when we are about to set out.

t_ch: *我们*从出生起就被关在这圣殿群中，从未踏出「万径之门」半步。为了解外面的世界，*我们*花了许多时间学习各种知识，当然也搞了点小发明。
t_en: We were raised in this temple complex and had never stepped outside the Gate of Infinity. To understand the outside world, we spent much of our time acquiring knowledge and developing a few inventions along the way.

t_ch: 可惜最后除了用来送信，没能派上其他用场。当初学会的知识…现在也都还回去了。
t_en: Sadly, the inventions served no purpose except to deliver letters, and the knowledge we gained... has all faded away by now.

t_ch: 这里有好多箱子……
t_en: There are so many boxes here...

t_ch: 应该是*我们*当年的行李吧…咦，这是？
t_en: These should be our belongings... Huh? What's this?

t_ch: 一块红玻璃？
t_en: A red glass fragment?

t_ch: 这玻璃制品，我见过。
t_en: I've seen this type of glass before.

t_ch: 似乎是你们家乡的特产。
t_en: It looks like a specialty from your hometown.

t_ch: *我们*第一次见它，还是很小的时候。妈妈带了一块好看的玻璃回来，可她脸上挂着泪痕，随手就把它放在桌上。
t_en: We were still very young the first time we saw it. Mother came back with a beautiful glass piece, but her face was streaked with tears. She simply placed it on the table.

t_ch: *我们*觉得它亮晶晶的，就拿来玩，结果不小心打碎了…妈妈也没说什么，只是抱着*我们*沉默了很久。
t_en: It looked so sparkly that we couldn't resist playing with it, but we ended up breaking it by accident. Mother didn't get angry. She simply held us quietly for a long time.

t_ch: 长大后*我们*才知道，在雅努萨波利斯，如果有人为命运光荣赴死，圣女就要从火山的采石场中撷下一块玻璃，细细打磨，交由死者家属接收。
t_en: It wasn't until we were older that we learned in Janusopolis, if someone gloriously died for destiny, the Holy Maiden must pick a piece of glass from the volcano's quarry and polish it, then give it to the deceased's family.

t_ch: 妈妈带着它回来的那天，她的朋友倒在了战场上。他没有活着的家人，这块玻璃就只能由她自己收留……
t_en: On the day Mother returned with the glass, her friend lost his life on the battlefield. Since he had no family left, Mother had to keep it herself...

t_ch: 后来，妈妈在仪式前夜…也给了*我们*一块美丽的玻璃。
t_en: Later, on the eve of the ritual... Mother also gave us a beautiful piece of glass.

t_ch: 书架上满满当当啊。怎么都是各个城邦的地理志？还有各种泰坦信仰的文献……
t_en: The shelf is packed full, but all I see are annals of geography for various cities. There are also documents about various kinds of Titan worship...

t_ch: 因为*我们*觉得，为了把{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神谕传递出去，肯定要走很远很远的路，所以想提前了解各地的风土人情。
t_en: Because we believed that we would need to travel great distances to convey {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s prophecy to everyone, and should learn about the terrains and customs of various places beforehand.

t_ch: 你们不会全都读完了吧…
t_en: Don't tell me you actually read them all...

t_ch: 啃这么多文献，太狠了。
t_en: Reading all of this... that's crazy.

t_ch: 那时的*我们*记性还很好，十年足够把这些全部记在心里。
t_en: Back then, our memories were still sharp. Ten years was enough for us to memorize all these.

t_ch: 这些卷轴也是妈妈留给*我们*的。记得小时候，她会当作睡前故事念给*我们*听。那些故事在她口中妙趣横生，足以在梦中勾勒出一片富饶的翁法罗斯。
t_en: Mother left us these scrolls too. When we were young, she would read them to us as bedtime stories. Her stories were so engaging that we could vividly imagine all of Amphoreus in our dreams.

t_ch: 可惜，妈妈离开后，*我们*才发现…原来这些卷轴里写的东西，一点都不有趣。
t_en: Unfortunately, only after Mother was gone did we realize that what was written in the scrolls was far from engaging.

t_ch: 是缇里西庇俄丝……
t_en: It's Tribios...

t_ch: 意料之中。毕竟，到了要启程的时候了。
t_en: Just as expected. It's time to get going, after all.

t_ch: 妈妈…你明天就要去参加*那个仪式*了吗？
t_en: Mama... are you going to that ritual tomorrow?

t_ch: 没错，我的好女孩。怎么了？
t_en: That's right, my sweet girl. What's the matter?

t_ch: 呜，我也想去…我有问题想问{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: I wish I could go too... I have something to ask {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 哦？是什么问题呢？
t_en: Oh? What do you want to ask?

t_ch: 我想问，怎么才能赶走黑潮！
t_en: I want to know how to chase the black tide away!

t_ch: 这样啊。不过很可惜，这是一场秘密仪式，只有妈妈才能主持。
t_en: Ah, I see. Unfortunately, it's a secret ritual, and only I can preside over it.

t_ch: 如果你想让妈妈帮你问问泰坦的想法…那就必须答应一件事。
t_en: If you want me to consult the Titan on your behalf... you'll have to promise me something.

t_ch: 是什么事？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 你要乖乖睡觉，无论梦到什么，都不要害怕——
t_en: Be a good girl and go to sleep now, and whatever you dream of, don't be afraid—

t_ch: 就这样，一觉睡到大清早，睡到明天，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}下一次睁眼的时候。能做到吗，亲爱的？
t_en: Just sleep through the night, until morning comes, until the next time {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} opens their eyes. Can you do that for me, sweetie?

t_ch: 这么简单，当然可以啦。缇里西庇俄丝可是最厉害的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}圣女…小圣女！
t_en: That's it? Of course I can! Tribios is the most amazing Holy Maiden of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... Well, little Holy Maiden!

t_ch: 可是，为什么呢？
t_en: But... why, Mama?

t_ch: 因为呀…这场仪式，可能会持续很久。
t_en: Because... this ritual might take a long time.

t_ch: 有多久？
t_en: How long?

t_ch: 我的好孩子…明天，妈妈就会回来。
t_en: Tomorrow, my sweet child. I'll be back tomorrow.

t_ch: 但如果明天来不及，那就明天的明天；如果明天的明天也不行，就等到下一个明天。如果过了很久很久，妈妈都没回来……
t_en: If not tomorrow, then the next tomorrow. If not the tomorrow after that. But if I still haven't returned for a very long time...

t_ch: 那就说明仪式已经成功，妈妈找到了赶走黑潮的办法，去到了彼岸那片崭新的天地。只是因为许多原因，妈妈没办法回过头，接上我的好女孩一起。
t_en: That means the ritual has succeeded. It means I've found a way to chase away the black tide and reached the new world on the other side. But for various reasons, I can't return to bring my sweet girl with me.

t_ch: 但妈妈会在那边等你，只要你做个勇敢、善良的孩子，我们就一定能在那片新天地重逢。
t_en: But I'll be waiting for you there. As long as you stay brave and kind, we'll meet again in that new world.

t_ch: 那里呀，是西风的尽头，黑潮的彼岸，受众神赐福护佑的、熠熠生辉的花海。
t_en: It's the end of the west wind, the black tide's other shore, a radiant sea of flowers blessed and protected by the gods.

t_ch: 在玫瑰色的天际中，你会看到一片银白的浅滩。那是旅途的终点，没有风雪、严寒、骤雨，没有人会受到悲伤的感染…妈妈就在那里等你。
t_en: In the rosy horizon, you'll see a silver-white shoal. It marks the end of your voyage — a haven free from storms, cold, and heavy rains. No sorrow can linger there... That is where I'll be waiting for you.

t_ch: 哇，听起来就像梦里的小岛！
t_en: Wow! That sounds just like the island from my dream!

t_ch: 我明白了——我会乘着月亮，扬起星星做的船帆去找妈妈！那我们约好了哦？
t_en: Oh, I know! I'll turn the moon into a ship and the stars into sails to go find Mama! Pinky promise?

t_ch: 嗯，约好了。
t_en: Mmm, pinky promise.

t_ch: 只要向着明天出发，只要明天的太阳还会升起……
t_en: As long as you sail toward tomorrow, as long as the sun will rise for the next day...

t_ch: 我们的愿望，就会一同实现。
t_en: Our wishes will come true together.

t_ch: 如果泰坦陨落时的呢喃并非戏言……
t_en: If the final murmurs of the Titan are true...

t_ch: 如果黑潮的彼岸，「创世」的尽头，真的存在那样一片天地……
t_en: If such a place really exists on the shore beyond the black tide and at the end of "Genesis"...

t_ch: 那我们的约定就依然还在。
t_en: Then our promise still stands.

t_ch: …等我，母亲。
t_en: ...Please wait for me, Mother.

t_ch: 在那暗无天日的十年间，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}最后一次睁眼时……
t_en: After those ten years of darkness, when {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} opened their eyes for the last time...

t_ch: *我们*出发了。
t_en: We finally set off.

t_ch: 这边来——接下来，我们要穿过这面书架。
t_en: This way. Now, we'll go through this shelf.

t_ch: 要怎么做，运用{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量么？
t_en: But how? With {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' power?

t_ch: 万径之力，就连墙都可以穿越…
t_en: Can the power of passages even go through walls?

t_ch: 不，这时的*我们*尚未获得它的力量。
t_en: No, we hadn't acquired their power back then.

t_ch: 这时候她应该还没成为半神吧。
t_en: She hadn't become a demigod yet.

t_ch: 没错，这时的*我们*尚未获得它的力量。
t_en: Indeed. We hadn't acquired their power back then.

t_ch: 那眼下这道阻碍…只是一道小小的障眼法？
t_en: So, this obstacle... it was simply a mirage?

t_ch: 是的。答案很简单，就在书架上——你们可以亲手试试。
t_en: Yes, the answer is right on the shelf. Go ahead and give it a try.

t_ch: 圣殿过去的通路意外的杂乱啊…是有人故意为之么？
t_en: The path to the temple was in quite a state... Did someone do it on purpose?

t_ch: 嗯。毫不意外，一些人留意到了*我们*的企图，想要出手阻止……
t_en: Mmm, no surprise at all. Some people caught on to what we were planning and tried to intercept us...

t_ch: 但也有人…愿意为圣女铺平道路。
t_en: While others were willing to clear the way for the Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 就像这样。
t_en: Just like this.

t_ch: 这是在复现记忆…
t_en: Is this replicating the memories...

t_ch: 还是在扰乱时空？
t_en: Or disrupting the spacetime dimension?

t_ch: 无论做什么都不会改变过往。真实的历史上，帮助缇里西庇俄丝的另有他人。
t_en: Regardless of our actions, the past will remain unchanged. It was someone else who helped Tribios in the actual events of history.

t_ch: *我们*也记不清细节了。但记忆把岁月塑造成这番模样，一定是因为……
t_en: We don't remember the details. As for why Memory recreated the past to be like this, it must be because...

t_ch: 它更接近*我们*心中的答案。
t_en: It's closer to the answer within our heart.

t_ch: 嚯，当年真是壮观啊。
t_en: Whoa, it looked truly magnificent back then!

t_ch: 别紧张…别紧张……
t_en: Relax... Take it easy...

t_ch: 周围这些人，应该只是平民，不是敌人吧？
t_en: All these people... They're just civilians, not enemies, correct?

t_ch: 大部分不是，但过会儿就不一定了。
t_en: Mostly, but it might not be the case later on.

t_ch: 呀，圣女大人！许久不见，今天怎么有兴致跑出来玩？是不是你那些小玩意又长翅膀飞了？
t_en: Hey, Lady Maiden! It's been a while! What's got you out and about today? Did your little inventions fly off on their own again?
Hmph...

t_ch: 哎唷，别拿这种眼神看我，这次我可真没拿。
t_en: Come on, don't give me that look! I promise, it wasn't me this time!

t_ch: 不过，虽然我没拿，可保不齐其它人不会动歪心思…毕竟圣女大人的手灵巧得很，你做的那些玩具，大家可都愿意高价收购呢，呵呵。
t_en: While I didn't take them this time, I can't speak for others. Your craftsmanship is brilliant! Those toys of yours could fetch a great price out there, hehe.

t_ch: …告辞。
t_en: ...Excuse me.

t_ch: 这人…是个商人世家的纨绔子弟。整日游手好闲，只会在圣殿周围晃来晃去，捡些朝圣者遗落的贡品来拿去做买卖…偶尔还会顺走*我们*的小发明。
t_en: This man... he's a good-for-nothing son of a merchant family, loitering around the temple and cashing in on the pilgrims' lost tributes. He even swipes our inventions now and then.

t_ch: 这种人，真不想留在记忆里呀……
t_en: People like this are best forgotten...

t_ch: 圣女大人，你怎么穿得这么薄就出来了？今天天冷，我去取条毯子来……
t_en: Lady Maiden, you need to dress warmer! It's pretty cold out. Let me get you a blanket...

t_ch: 不用啦，女士，我就是出来散散步，马上就回去。
t_en: No need to trouble yourself. I'm just going for a quick walk.

t_ch: 唉，好吧…你可要保重身体。令堂临行前对我们千叮咛万嘱咐，一定要照顾好你呢。
t_en: ...Alright, but please take care of yourself. Your mother made us promise to look after you before she left.

t_ch: 呵呵，说到这个才发觉…许久没见，你竟已出落得和你母亲一般美丽了啊。
t_en: Hehe, it's been a while since I last saw you, and I just realized you've grown into such a beauty, just like your mother.

t_ch: 来来，吃些甜饼吧！她以前很喜欢我做的点心，或许你和她口味相仿呢。
t_en: Here, have some of my sweet pastries. She used to enjoy them, so maybe you'll like them too.

t_ch: 圣女大人，怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong, Lady Maiden?

t_ch: 我…没事，女士。这甜饼…真好吃。
t_en: I'm... fine. It tastes... really good.

t_ch: 这位女士是妈妈的故交。小的时候，偶尔能吃到妈妈带回来的甜饼。
t_en: This lady is Mother's old friend. When we were little, we sometimes got to eat the sweet pastries she brought back.

t_ch: *我们*忘不了那熟悉的味道，也是直到这时，才知道它来自哪里。
t_en: We've always remembered the familiar taste, and only now do we learn where it came from.

t_ch: 咦，孩子们，你们是从哪儿跑进来的？
t_en: Hey, little ones! How did you sneak in here?

t_ch: 嘘，嘘！大姐姐，声音轻点！我们好不容易才偷偷溜进来。
t_en: Shh, shh! Please keep it down! We had to be really sneaky to get in here!

t_ch: 好，我知道啦。不过，你们专程溜进来，是想……
t_en: Okay, okay. But what did you sneak in here for?

t_ch: 我听说神殿里面住着一位漂亮的圣女大人，想要见见她！
t_en: I heard there's a lovely Holy Maiden living in the temple, and I wanna meet her!

t_ch: 我拗不过她，只好想办法带她溜进来了。
t_en: I couldn't stop her, so I had to think of a way to sneak her in.

t_ch: 这样啊！我也是来见圣女大人的。可惜听卫兵说，她今天要出远门呢。
t_en: Oh, really? I was here to meet the Holy Maiden as well! But the guard said she had to go somewhere far away today.

t_ch: 啊，怎么这样…妈妈还托我带了礼物呢……
t_en: Huh? What a bummer! Mommy even asked me to bring her gift to the Holy Maiden...

t_ch: 乖，时候不早啦，快回家去吧。
t_en: It's getting late! Be good and go home now, okay?

t_ch: 好吧，那我们下次再来！谢谢你，大姐姐。
t_en: Okay, then. We'll come back next time! Thank you!

t_ch: 这两个孩子…看打扮是在圣殿外生活的平民。听妈妈说，她还是圣女的时候，曾经有个女孩闯进神殿，想要偷贡品，被她看见了。
t_en: By the way they are dressed, the siblings look like civilians living outside the temple. Mother mentioned that when she was a Holy Maiden, she caught a girl sneaking into the temple to steal the tributes.

t_ch: 在神殿偷窃是死罪，可那女孩年纪还小，无依无靠，只是想填饱肚子。妈妈就把她抱出了神殿，还悄悄塞给她一些好吃的。
t_en: Stealing from the temple was punishable by death, but that poor girl had no family and just wanted something to eat. So, Mother took her outside and even gave her some food.

t_ch: 也许，眼前这两个孩子…就是当年那女孩的后代呢。
t_en: Perhaps these two children are the descendants of that girl from back then.

t_ch: 圣女大人，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库今天正在修缮……
t_en: Apologies, Lady Maiden, but the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault is under maintenance today.

t_ch: 那更好啦，没人会打扰我和妈妈聊天了。
t_en: Perfect. That way, no one will disturb me while I'm talking to Mother.

t_ch: 唉…也好。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为您指明出路。
t_en: *sigh* Alright then. May {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库」是？
t_en: The {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault?

t_ch: 是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}心脏所在，火种保管处，就在左边往里走……
t_en: It's where {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' heart lies and the Coreflame is kept. Just enter on the left...

t_ch: 那也是缇里西庇俄丝出生的地方。
t_en: It's also the place where Tribios was born.

t_ch: 终于……
t_en: At long last...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝…你来了。
t_en: Tribios... you've come.

t_ch: …{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，我就知道你还有一丝理性。果然…你也被囚禁了。
t_en: ...I knew there was some sanity left in you, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. Just as I thought... you too have been confined.

t_ch: 踏上前来，汝会亲手埋葬自己……
t_en: Step forth, and thou shalt bury yourself...

t_ch: 埋葬众神，和制约吾等的命运。
t_en: Bury the gods, and bury the fate that binds us all.

t_ch: 不是的，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: No, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 以羔羊的热血，和我紧握利刃的右手封证……
t_en: By the blood of the lamb and the strength of my blade-wielding right hand...

t_ch: 我是缇里西庇俄丝，聆听预言、告说预言，印证预言者——
t_en: I am Tribios, the Listener, the announcer, and the witness of the prophecy —

t_ch: ——我，雅努萨波利斯的圣女，万径之践行人，前来接过你的{RUBY_B#火种}使命{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: — I, the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the walker of the infinite paths, have come forth to assume your {RUBY_B#Coreflame}duty{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 呵呵……
t_en: Hehe...

t_ch: 指引世人者，灵魂必遭歧路分离，碎作千片化身，如琉璃掷地……
t_en: The one who guides the world shall see their soul shattered into a thousand fragments, akin to glass crashing upon the ground...

t_ch: 正合我意。这注定是段漫长的旅途，有一千个自己作伴，我便永远不会孤独。
t_en: Just as I wished. This journey promises to be a long one. With a thousand selves to accompany me, I'll never be lonely.

t_ch: 纵使身负火种，汝亦将远离成神的光荣，「门径」总与泥尘作伴，哪怕凡人的锋刃亦能将汝胁迫……
t_en: Though thou bearest the Coreflame, thou shalt be far from the glory of divinity. "Passages" are forever associated with dirt, and even a mere mortal's blade can imperil thy very existence...

t_ch: 无妨。我的双手不为挥舞枪矛而生，而双足生来便要为众生奔走。
t_en: No matter. My hands are not made for bearing arms, but my feet are destined to embark on a journey for the benefit of all.

t_ch: 即便如此，逐火仍是不断失却的旅途：在那一切当中，生命也不足为惜……
t_en: Yet, the Flame-Chase is a journey of constant loss, among which even life itself holds little value....

t_ch: 岁月将磨灭心性，门径将瓦解肉身，天平将称量别离，直至末路抵近……
t_en: Time decays the heart, the passages shatter the body, and the scales weigh the separation, until the end draws near...

t_ch: 身负三重生命之女…汝真的准备好了？
t_en: The one who bears three lives... art thou truly prepared?

t_ch: 当然，泰坦。就让这预言将我打碎——
t_en: Without a doubt, Titan. Let the prophecy shatter me —

t_ch: ——好让我为这濒毁的世界，开辟出万千道路！
t_en: — so that I may open a myriad of paths for this imperiled world!

t_ch: 如此…甚好……
t_en: Thus... it shall be...

t_ch: 倾覆诸神吧—— / 归还火种吧——
t_en: Overthrow the gods — / Return the Coreflames —

t_ch: 承载神权吧—— / 铸造神迹吧——
t_en: Inherit divine authority — / Forge godly miracles —

t_ch: 去猎杀吧—— / 去哀悼吧——
t_en: Go kill — / Go mourn —

t_ch: 去猎杀吾等同袍吧—— / 去哀悼吾等命运吧——
t_en: Kill my kin — / Mourn our fate —

t_ch: 去引渡众神灵魂吧—— / 去用神灵滋养乐土吧——
t_en: Ferry the spirits of the gods — / Nourish the land with divine essence —

t_ch: 然而，汝须记得—— / 然而，汝应记得——
t_en: Yet, thou shalt remember — / Yet, thou must remember —

t_ch: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹——</color>{RUBY_E#}
t_en: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —</color>{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>此乃——命运使然——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Such... is destiny —</color>

t_ch: 我明白，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: I understand, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 谢谢。然后…好好睡吧。
t_en: Thank you. Now... may you rest well.

t_ch: 母亲啊……
t_en: Mother...

t_ch: 您…看到了吗…？
t_en: Did you... see that?

t_ch: 我已接过使命，就要启程了……
t_en: I have assumed my duty and stand ready to set out...

t_ch: 我将越过众神的残骸，在凡人中流离……
t_en: We will step over the gods' corpses and wander among humanity...

t_ch: 如此，拨开翁法罗斯漆黑的迷雾……
t_en: And thus, we shall sweep apart Amphoreus' pitch-dark fog...

t_ch: 愿我们…愿一切世人……
t_en: May we... May the world...

t_ch: 都能循着那踏出的万千道路…在鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚。
t_en: Follow the myriad paths trodden and reunite at the end of the west wind... where flowers bloom in spring.

t_ch: 妈妈…明天见。
t_en: Mother... I shall see you tomorrow.

t_ch: 染指火种者！无论是谁——解除武装，立刻开门投降！
t_en: Who dares lay hands on the Coreflame! Drop your weapon and surrender at once!

t_ch: 果然，还是来了啊。
t_en: I knew this would come.

t_ch: 怎么回事？圣女大人，那个亵渎火种的盗贼在哪里？
t_en: What's happening here? Lady Maiden, where's the thief who stole the Coreflame?

t_ch: 蠢货！看她怀里，她就是那个贼——
t_en: Look at what she's holding, you buffoon! She is the thief —

t_ch: 列队，架起长枪！夺回火种！
t_en: Take your positions and ready your arms! We're taking back the Coreflame!

t_ch: …动手吧。
t_en: ...Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: ...What?

t_ch: 上前来吧，忠诚的守卫，至少做好这事…刺穿我的胸膛。
t_en: Come forth, loyal guards. At least do it properly — pierce me in the chest.

t_ch: 你在打什么主意……
t_en: What are you scheming?

t_ch: 这是我最后一次让步。如果你们中有人想要建功立业，平步青云……
t_en: This is your last chance. If anyone wants to earn a promotion and rise through the ranks —

t_ch: 你们都认得我，我就在这里——动手吧！
t_en: I'm right here. You all know who I am — go ahead.

t_ch: 但若你们中还有忠诚的卫士，就速速为圣女让出道路……
t_en: However, if there's still any loyalty within you, step aside for the Holy Maiden...

t_ch: 否则，依圣城法典，对圣女无礼乃至动武者——格杀勿论！
t_en: Otherwise, by the decree of the holy city's codex, anyone who dares to harm the Holy Maiden shall face execution!

t_ch: 队、队长…怎么办……
t_en: C—Captain, what should we do...

t_ch: 这…这……
动手…干掉她！
t_en: Do it... Kill her!

t_ch: 想过好日子的兄弟们，跟上我…干掉这个叛徒，用她的脑袋领赏…！
t_en: If any of you want to get rich, then come with me! Take this traitor's head and wealth will be ours!

t_ch: 怎么…可能……
t_en: How's... that possible...?

t_ch: 难道，泰坦…站在她那边…？
t_en: Could the Titan... actually be on her side...?

t_ch: 叛徒在那边！ / 抓住她！ / 红头发的女人是叛徒！
t_en: The traitor's over there! / Get her! / That red-head woman is the traitor!

t_ch: …走吧。
t_en: ...I should go.

t_ch: 我们也跟上。
t_en: Let's keep up.

t_ch: 圣城卫队豢养的奇兽？明明只有一步之遥了……
t_en: A creature of the holy city guards? But I'm already so close...

t_ch: 这应该是最后一战了，得替她解围才行。
t_en: This should be the last fight. We have to help her get through.

t_ch: 但是…我不明白，从刚才开始就摸不着头脑。
t_en: But... I don't get it. This has been puzzling me for a while now.

t_ch: 到底是谁在帮助缇里西庇俄丝出逃？
t_en: Who has been aiding Tribios in her escape?

t_ch: 我刚才就想问了…
t_en: I've been curious about that, too...

t_ch: 是死去的泰坦显灵？
t_en: Is the fallen Titan manifesting?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯世界观也不严谨嘛。
t_en: Logic in Amphoreus isn't adding up.

t_ch: 虽说记忆会模糊历史，可看这满城追缉的样子，怎么也不像是有盟友……
t_en: While history might be blurred by memories, seeing how the whole city is hunting her down, she clearly had no allies...

t_ch: 如果是她一个人做到的，过程中我们的存在感…是不是又太强了？
t_en: If she pulled it off alone, were we too involved in this process?

t_ch: 从进入宝库开始，缇里西庇俄丝就是孤身一人了。
t_en: Tribios had been on her own since she entered the vault.

t_ch: 但*我们*对于她意味着什么…这个问题的答案，就在这段记忆的尽头。
t_en: But what did we truly mean to her? You'll find that answer at the end of this memory.

t_ch: 既然缇宁老师都这么说了，那就先专注眼前的事吧。各位，我们上！
t_en: In that case, let's focus on the mission at hand now. Let's do this, everyone!

t_ch: 终于…这道山门背后，就是广袤的天地。
t_en: Finally... beyond this gate awaits a boundless world.

t_ch: 我的旅途，将要从这里开启。
t_en: This is where my journey begins.

t_ch: 门径之神，你在看着我吗？你未尽的道路…我会将其完成。
t_en: God of passages, can you see me? I will complete the path... that you started.

t_ch: 没有回应呢。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}…祝你做个好梦。
t_en: No response after all. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... may you have a good dream.

t_ch: 此地不宜久留，该走了。
t_en: I can't stay here much longer. It's time to leave.

t_ch: 看来…记忆到这里还是结束了。
t_en: Well... looks like this is the end of the memory.

t_ch: …不，还没有。
t_en: ...Not yet.

t_ch: 令你困惑的那个问题……
t_en: The question that has been puzzling you...

t_ch: 她正要给出回答。
t_en: She's about to reveal the answer.

t_ch: 可是，什么都没发生。
t_en: But nothing happened.

t_ch: 她，或者说你们，此刻在犹豫什么呢？
t_en: What was making her, or you, hesitate at this moment?

t_ch: 如果她此时已经知道，这趟逐火之旅果真如泰坦所说，必将引发巨大的浩劫，伴随众多的牺牲，甚至包括她自己……
t_en: If she had known this Flame-Chase Journey would proceed as the Titan foretold, bringing about great suffering and fatalities, including her own...

t_ch: 她还会穿过这道山门，踏上旅途吗？
t_en: Would she still have chosen to walk through the gate and start her journey?

t_ch: 我想……
t_en: I think...

t_ch: 你已明白答案，并亲手做出了决定。
t_en: The answer is already within you, and you've made your own decision.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: ...What?

t_ch: 你…能听见我们说话？
t_en: You can... hear us?

t_ch: 不是的……
t_en: Not really...

t_ch: 她听不见，也看不见我们。
t_en: She can neither see nor hear us.

t_ch: 但她知道，肯定会有一天，会有人回到这里，翻开尘封的记忆。
t_en: Yet, she knew that one day, someone would return to unveil this dust-covered memory.

t_ch: 当年究竟是何人施以援手，如今已无从得知。但这份心意始终烙印在心中，激励着*我们*一路前行——为了不忘初心，岁月将这段记忆修饰成了一封特别的信。
t_en: We can never know for sure who helped us back then. But that kindness was forever engraved in our hearts, motivating us to move forward. Time has modified this memory into a special letter, so that we do not forget our original intent.

t_ch: 它由过去的*缇里西庇俄丝*写下，寄给未来的自己。在这道记忆中，是将来的缇里西庇俄丝为她排除万难，送她踏上遥远的旅途…前往*我们*所在的明天。
t_en: It's a letter written by Tribios of the past and sent to her future self. In this memory, it is Tribios of the future who overcomes all difficulties for her and sends her on a long journey... toward the tomorrow where we are.

t_ch: 是啊…你会回想起来的，然后下定决心，帮助自己重新来到最初的门前。
t_en: Yes, you'll remember it all, and then find your way back to the gate where everything began.

t_ch: 从这里开始，我将踏上遥远的旅途。
t_en: Here, I will set sail toward the distant horizon.

t_ch: 从这里开始，你已走过漫长的归路。
t_en: Here, you have traveled far on your way home.

t_ch: 命运的箴言如此为缇里西庇俄丝揭示——<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>
t_en: Such is the maxim that unveils Tribios' fate: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither on the soil of foreign lands."</color>

t_ch: 所以，如果感到自己迷失了方向，就回到这儿来吧。我把启程时的心愿留在这里，等待着你——我自己——再度拾起。
t_en: So, if you ever feel lost, return to this place. I'll keep this memory here for you — or for me — to embrace it again.

t_ch: 别担心。虽然*我们*早已习惯失去，但唯独决心与誓言，缇里西庇俄丝绝不会忘记。
t_en: Worry not. Though loss is something we've grown used to, our resolve and our pledge are what Tribios will never forget.

t_ch: *我们*中的每一个人，也不曾忘记。
t_en: Each one of us has never failed to remember.

t_ch: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
t_en: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."

t_ch: 「羔羊的热血不会白流，一如我与母亲。」
t_en: "The hot blood of the sacrificial lamb will not be spilled in vain, like my mother and I."

t_ch: 「泼洒的奠酒必得馈答，正如我紧握利刃的右手并非虚设的仪酬。」
t_en: "The libations poured are guaranteed to bear fruit, just as my blade-wielding right hand is not a hollow formality."

t_ch: 「翻越{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的万千门径，然后，*我们*必将再一次——」
t_en: "Surmount the myriad passages of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, and we will once again—"

t_ch: 「乘着西风，展翅远行。」
t_en: "Ride the west wind and let the wings carry us far away."

t_ch: 这…就是你们的答案。
t_en: So this... is your answer.

t_ch: 没错，以命运三相之名：这就是我的回答，绝无悔改。
t_en: That's right. In the name of the Three Fates, I stand by my answer with no regrets.

t_ch: 现在，无论众神满意与否……
t_en: Now, with or without the gods' blessing...

t_ch: 我都将奔向人间的苦难。
t_en: I run towards the world's agony.

t_ch: 若我果真能冲破世间的至暗……
t_en: If I can truly pierce through the utter darkness...

t_ch: 我们就在那鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚吧。
t_en: We will meet again at the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring.

t_ch: 光历<unbreak>3760</unbreak>年 长夜月
t_en: Light Calendar <unbreak>3760</unbreak>, Month of Evernight

t_ch: 「雅努萨波利斯的圣女」缇里西庇俄丝，为平息世间祸乱，背负火种，成为雅努斯之半神。
t_en: "Janusopolis' Holy Maiden" Tribios bore the Coreflame to quell the world's chaos and became a demigod of Janus.

t_ch: 她穿越「万径之门」，分裂为千名信使，将创世的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
t_en: She traversed the "Gate of Infinity," splitting into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy across the land of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 历经百年苦旅后……
t_en: After a century of arduous journeying...

t_ch: 光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年 自由月
t_en: Light Calendar <unbreak>3870</unbreak>, Month of Freedom

t_ch: 人类的逐火之旅，正式开启。
t_en: Humanity's Flame-Chase Journey officially began.

t_ch: 缇宝大人，你依然觉得……
t_en: Lady Tribbie, do you still think...

t_ch: 等到明天，一切就会好起来吗？
t_en: That everything will be fine tomorrow?

t_ch: 嗯，缇安也会这么说的。
t_en: Yeah, that's what Trianne would say as well.

t_ch: 恕我冒犯，但……
t_en: With all due respect...

t_ch: 缇宝大人，你分明知道…那句*明天见*只是一个善意的谎言。
t_en: Lady Tribbie, you know perfectly well... that see you tomorrow is nothing but a white lie.

t_ch: 我不希望你的坚强…只是强颜欢笑的孤独。
t_en: I hope your toughness is not a mask hiding a lonely heart.

t_ch: 阿蝶，那不是谎言。
t_en: Cas, that's not a lie.

t_ch: *明天见*…是世上最伟大的预言。
t_en: See you tomorrow is the greatest prophecy in the world.

t_ch: 预言…？
t_en: Prophecy...?

t_ch: 你听：在这片土地上，每一个时刻，每一个角落，都有人在期待这道预言兑现。
t_en: Listen. In every corner of this land, every heartbeat carries a prayer for that prophecy to come true.

t_ch: 为新世界带来明天的，或许只是几位英雄。但引领大家迈向明天的预言，却属于翁法罗斯的每一个人。
t_en: It may be that only a few heroes will bring tomorrow to the new world, but the prophecy of leading everyone to tomorrow belongs to all in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 但不是每个人都有机会走到明天。这样的话语，如何能被称作预言？
t_en: But not everyone has the chance to see tomorrow. How can such words be called a prophecy?

t_ch: 因为人们相信它会实现。人们试着相信它会实现。
t_en: Because people believe it will come true, and they are trying hard to hold onto that belief.

t_ch: 即便世界已经成了如今摇摇欲坠的样子，大家也仍然拼尽全力，想要走得更远，走向明天。
t_en: Even as the world teeters on the brink of collapse, everyone is pressing forward, longing to reach farther and move toward tomorrow.

t_ch: 也正因此，才会有指点迷津的圣女为众人指引明天所在——雅努萨波利斯的预言才会以「门径」的形式呈现。
t_en: And that is why a Holy Maiden exists to lead the world toward tomorrow, and why Janusopolis' prophecy unfolds as passages.

t_ch: 「命运」不是结果，而是过程。它不是生长在道路尽头的花朵……
t_en: "Fate" is not about the outcome, but the journey. It's not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road...

t_ch: 而是跨过门扉后，人们朝着花海的方向，自己踏出的小径。
t_en: But rather the paths that lead beyond the gate, where people tread toward the sea of flowers.

t_ch: 所以，蝶…如果有什么想不通的，把它交给明天就好啦。
t_en: So, Cas, if anything is troubling you, just set it aside for tomorrow.

t_ch: 从来没有什么「半神」与「人」的差别，每个人所面对的烦恼，都只能靠未来的自己解决。
t_en: There's no difference between demigods and mortals. The troubles we encounter can only be resolved by our future selves.

t_ch: 在长夜里不断思考，在思考中等待破晓，然后在破晓时迈出脚步…停下的*我们*会留在身后的黑夜，但前进的*我们*不会感到恐惧。
t_en: Reflect through the long night, wait for the dawn as you think, then set off at daybreak. The hesitant part of us will be left behind in the dark, while the determined side of us will know no fear.

t_ch: 因为缇里西庇俄丝正是这么一路走来，传颂着预言……
t_en: Because that's how Tribios has journeyed so far to spread the prophecy...

t_ch: 呼唤着朝阳…和它终将带来的明天。
t_en: Beckoning the morning sun... and the tomorrow it promises to bring.

t_ch: 我回来了。终于有时间休整一下…来聊聊吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: I'm back. Finally have a moment to catch my breath. Want to chat, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 奇怪，迷迷不在你身边？
t_en: It's unusual to see Mem isn't with you.

t_ch: 让它休息吧，这几天累坏了。
t_en: Let Mem rest. They've had a tiring past few days.

t_ch: 不知道，我也管不了它…
t_en: No idea. I can't control Mem...

t_ch: 放心，在球里呢。
t_en: Don't worry. They're inside the ball.

t_ch: …这种玩笑可不敢乱开。
t_en: ...Let's not joke about monsters in your pockets.

t_ch: 既然它不在，那我就先问你吧。<color=#dbc291ff>你真打算代替黄金裔，接受</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>岁月之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>火种的试炼？</color>
t_en: Since they're not here, let me ask you — <color=#dbc291ff>are you really sure you want to take on the trial of </color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Time Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s Coreflame on behalf of the Chrysos Heirs?</color>

t_ch: 当然，为什么不呢？
t_en: Absolutely! I don't see why not.

t_ch: 没想好，是迷迷出的主意…
t_en: Still on the fence. It was Mem's idea...

t_ch: 也该升升级了，合情合理。
t_en: It's about time for me to level up.

t_ch: …结果还是走到了这一步，大概是「开拓」逃不开的宿命吧？
t_en: ...We've ended up at this point after all. This is probably a fate that "Trailblaze" can't evade.

t_ch: 你最好多留个神，优先自保。从前人的经验来看，试炼绝非儿戏。
t_en: You should be extra cautious and watch out for yourself. Based on the experiences of those before you, the trial is no walk in the park.

t_ch: 但我更害怕的是，你会把自己和翁法罗斯绑得太紧…如果真的接过了那位泰坦的神职，你还有机会把它放下么？
t_en: But what concerns me even more is that you'll further bind yourself to Amphoreus... If you truly assume that Titan's divinity, do you believe you'll be able to lay it down again?

t_ch: 算了，走一步看一步吧。不论发生什么，我陪你。
t_en: Forget it. We'll deal with that when the time comes. No matter what happens, I'll be right there with you.

t_ch: 谢谢，好兄弟！
t_en: Thanks, bro!

t_ch: 话说回来，之前我被两个卫兵打扮的人缠住了，害我错过了缇安的送别仪式。
t_en: Oh, by the way, I got held up by two people in guard uniforms and ended up missing Trianne's farewell ceremony.

t_ch: 这么煽情，前面跑哪去了？
t_en: Aww, how sweet! But where were you earlier?

t_ch: 我被两个卫兵打扮的人缠住了，害我错过了缇安的送别仪式。
t_en: I got held up by two people in guard uniforms and ended up missing Trianne's farewell ceremony.

t_ch: 他们自称是<color=#dbc291ff>元老院的使者</color>，要对我的身份进行盘查。
t_en: They said they were <color=#dbc291ff>messengers of the Council of Elders</color> and wanted to verify my identity.

t_ch: 但我猜，我们被盯上应该已经有一阵了…只是特意等到你我分开才开始行动。
t_en: But I suspect we've been on their radar for a while... and they only made their move when you and I got separated.

t_ch: 他们的提问事无巨细：从我们来到奥赫玛的过程，到和每位黄金裔的私交，连我们在市集的经历都要剖根问底。
t_en: Their questions were quite specific, from how we arrived in Okhema to our relationships with each Chrysos Heir. They even asked about what we did in the market.

t_ch: 还好那两个喽啰的脑子不太灵光，多数问题都被我搪塞过去了。他们一时半会儿，应该不会来找麻烦。
t_en: Luckily, those pawns aren't the brightest. I managed to brush off most of their questions, so they'll probably leave us alone for a bit.

t_ch: 元老院…是坏人吗？
t_en: The Council of Elders... are they the bad guys?

t_ch: 我不想做非黑即白的断定，但他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
t_en: I'm not ready to label them as good or bad, but their conduct... is certainly irritating.

t_ch: 奥赫玛城里暗流涌动啊。
t_en: Looks like dark undercurrents are roiling in Okhema.

t_ch: 他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
t_en: Their conduct... is certainly irritating.

t_ch: 这是在给下个版本埋伏笔？
t_en: Is this foreshadowing for the next version?

t_ch: 他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
t_en: Their conduct... is certainly irritating.

t_ch: 但转念一想，阿格莱雅当初也没放下对我们的戒备。在摸清底细前，最好不要得罪任何一方。
t_en: But on second thought, Aglaea also initially kept her guard up with us. It's best not to provoke either side until we know the full truth.

t_ch: 眼下唯一能确认的，就是<color=#dbc291ff>元老院中有人对黄金裔颇为不满</color>。最坏的情况…我们可能会被卷入圣城的内斗漩涡。
t_en: The only thing we know for sure is that <color=#dbc291ff>some members of the Council of Elders aren't happy with the Chrysos Heirs</color>. In the worst-case scenario... we could be caught up in the internal conflicts of the holy city.

t_ch: 我就喜欢这集。
t_en: That's my favorite episode.

t_ch: 我就讨厌这集。
t_en: That's the episode I hate the most.

t_ch: 未完待续。
t_en: To be continued?

t_ch: 要是能有些喘息空间就好了，那样还能整理下黑潮的线索。但现在……
t_en: If only we had more time to sort through the clues about the black tide. But now...

t_ch: 只有天气还算不错，再用相机拍几张照片吧。
t_en: The weather is the only lovely thing left. Let's take some more pictures.

t_ch: 嗯？怎么回事……
t_en: Huh? What's going on?

t_ch: 怎么了，丹恒？
t_en: Something wrong, Dan Heng?
Ah...

t_ch: 原来是储存卡满了。
t_en: The memory card is full.

t_ch: 想必三月他们，现在也很焦虑吧？
t_en: I bet March and the others are pretty worried too.
Hehe...

t_ch: 人子哪，莫不是在等那黑夜临近？
t_en: Child of humanity, surely you are not waiting for the arrival of night?

t_ch: 黑夜不可能降临在奥赫玛。
t_en: Nights do not fall upon Okhema.

t_ch: 正因此，汝痴痴立于此处，才是徒劳。
t_en: That's why it's futile for you to wait here.

t_ch: …老实说，我真没想到大名鼎鼎的「理性」泰坦竟是这副嘴脸。
t_en: ...Honestly, I didn't expect the renowned Reason Titan to behave like this.

t_ch: 啊呀…这可全要拜你所赐呢。若非汝之灵魂活像只刺猬扎手，吾又怎会成了这样？
t_en: Heh... And that's all thanks to you. If your soul weren't as prickly as a hedgehog, I wouldn't have to act this way.

t_ch: 若汝能圆融些，吾便不必时时遭汝针锋相对，更能率性提点你了。
t_en: If you were more accommodating, you wouldn't be opposing me all the time, and I could teach you more freely instead.

t_ch: 还不是你非得将火种植入我体内…算了，有话说话，别阴阳怪气。
t_en: It was you who insisted on implanting the Coreflame in me... Forget it. Cut the sarcasm and just say what you need to say.

t_ch: 好，好。吾不过是想提醒一句……
t_en: Fine, fine. All I want is to remind you...

t_ch: 汝魂魄已所剩无几。要是再无所作为，就只能由吾掌管这副躯壳了。
t_en: There's not much left in your soul. If you don't do something soon, I will have to take over this body.

t_ch: 我都不急，你急什么？别以为我不知道，你不过是想要我帮你解答那个问题——
t_en: If I'm not worried, why should you be? I know what you're planning. You just want my help answering the question —

t_ch: ——「我们」究竟为何物，对吗？
t_en: "What exactly are 'we'?" Correct?

t_ch: 汝记得便好，正所谓「等价交换」嘛。
t_en: It's good that you remember. Thus, "equivalent exchange" — it's only fair.

t_ch: 好，放心吧。答案呼之欲出，你很快就得把身体还给我了。
t_en: Then, rest easy. The answer will soon be revealed, and you'll have to return my body shortly.

t_ch: 呵呵…当真？
t_en: Hehe, is that true?

t_ch: 当真。我本以为，眼下这动不动死去活来的状态会妨碍我取回身体……
t_en: Certainly. I initially thought this extremely frail state would hinder me from getting my body back...

t_ch: 没想到答案反而就在其中。哼，省了我不少力气，连那黑袍剑士的仪式剑都不需要了。
t_en: But I didn't expect the answer to be right within it. Hmph, that saved me a lot of trouble — I don't even need the black-robed swordmaster's ceremonial blade.

t_ch: 那可真是一件大喜事哪。
t_en: That's certainly worth celebrating.

t_ch: 只可惜…接下来这场实验，偏偏不能由我亲自来做啊。
t_en: Regrettably... I can't carry out the upcoming experiment alone.

t_ch: 那与死亡如影随形的女孩，已做足准备了么？
t_en: The girl who's walking with death... is she fully prepared?

t_ch: 别心急，泰坦……
t_en: Be patient, Titan...

t_ch: 如果我们总是严阵以待…「死亡」又怎敢轻易找上门呢？
t_en: If we're always so guarded, how can "Death" reach us easily?

t_ch: 可惜，我得代表奥赫玛，请你们放缓脚步了。
t_en: Unfortunately, on behalf of Okhema, I must ask you to slow your pace.

t_ch: 呵…忘了还有你，不好意思。
t_en: Heh... I forgot about you. My apologies.

t_ch: 童言无忌，我就当这是顽童的无心之言吧。
t_en: A child's words are always carefree. I'll just dismiss these words as nonsense from a cheeky child.

t_ch: 来吧，傲慢的「大表演家」，是时候聊聊你与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦，瑟希斯}那位泰坦{RUBY_E#}的机缘巧合了。
t_en: Come now, conceited "performer." It's time to address your relationship with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan, Cerces}that Titan{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 如果我说「不」呢？
t_en: What if I refuse?

t_ch: 挑衅只会在{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天秤上徒增你死的砝码，事情不必走到那一步。
t_en: Provocation will only tip {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}'s scales further toward your demise. There's no need to go to such lengths.

t_ch: 非人非神的怪物，别忘了，你不敢杀我。倘若掐灭了「理性」的火种——
t_en: O monster neither human nor divine, don't forget that you won't dare kill me. If you snuff out the Coreflame of "Reason" —

t_ch: 你还能拿什么和元老院抗衡？
t_en: What else can you use to stand against the Council?

t_ch: 唔…两位，介意吾稍微打个岔么？
t_en: Eh... Do you two mind if I cut in?

t_ch: 我说过，别打断我——
t_en: I warned you. Do not interrupt me —

t_ch: 啊呀，吾只是从刚才就想说：死亡于你而言，当真有所谓么？
t_en: Ahh. I just have been meaning to ask: Does death really matter to you?

t_ch: …什么意思？
t_en: ...What do you mean?

t_ch: 吾的意思是，在吾将火种注入汝的心脏前……
t_en: What I mean is, before I implanted the Coreflame into your heart...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>…汝早就是尸身一具了哪？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...you were already a silent, cold corpse.</color>

t_ch: 欢迎您，圣女。
t_en: Greetings, Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 愿雅努斯为您引路。
t_en: May Janus guide your path.

t_ch: 注意安全，圣女。
t_en: Holy Maiden, please take care.

t_ch: 请保持距离，圣女。
t_en: Please stay clear, Holy Maiden.

t_ch: 现在 奥赫玛
t_en: Presently, in Okhema

t_ch: 你的声音变得…好成熟。
t_en: Your voice now sounds so... mature.

t_ch: 与此同时 云石天宫的另一边
t_en: At the same time, on the other side of Marmoreal Palace
